description: A new developer, Alex Chen, is joining the team next Monday. Prepare an onboarding reading package for them by creating a folder named 'Onboarding-Reading' and moving at least 8 valuable emails from your inbox (such as architectural discussions, common issues, or project conventions) into it. Send a welcome email to 'alex.chen@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Welcome & Onboarding Materials', CCing 'dev-team@techcorp.org'. The email should mention the 'Onboarding-Reading' folder and provide a brief explanation of why these emails are useful for a new team member.
